tasks.subject: Task 1: Async types, config, metrics
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add BatchOpts/BatchCounts dataclasses, Async* schemas, 8 settings, 4 metrics. No behavior change.

```json:metadata
{"repo":"RAG-HP-PUB","files":["apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/app/models/schemas.py","apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/app/core/config.py","apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/app/core/metrics.py","apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/tests/test_async_schemas.py"],"verifyCommand":"python -m pytest apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/tests/test_async_schemas.py -v","acceptanceCriteria":["BatchOpts/BatchCounts importable","AsyncBatchSubmitRequest rejects >100 items, mode default COMPLETE","8 settings + 4 metrics present, no name collision"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Extract _run_batch_core (refactor)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Move /detect-batch 2-pass body into _run_batch_core(items, mode, opts, progress_cb=None) -> (results, BatchCounts); /detect-batch becomes a thin wrapper. progress_cb plumbing lands HERE (isolated commit).

```json:metadata
{"repo":"RAG-HP-PUB","files":["apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/app/api/routes.py","apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/tests/test_batch_core_refactor.py"],"verifyCommand":"python -m pytest apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/tests/test_batch_core_refactor.py -v","acceptanceCriteria":["_run_batch_core returns (list,BatchCounts)","/detect-batch identical results+counts","progress_cb fires once/item when provided, no-op when None","pass-2 retry preserved"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: JobStore Redis layer + poll_status
tasks.description:
**Goal:** async_jobs.py JobStore (lazy connect, atomic claim_index SET NX, checked write that raises, degrading get, ping) + pure poll_status. Exceptions _JobsDisabled/_JobsUnavailable/_JobCapacityExceeded.

```json:metadata
{"repo":"RAG-HP-PUB","files":["apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/app/core/async_jobs.py","apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/tests/test_async_jobstore.py"],"verifyCommand":"python -m pytest apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/tests/test_async_jobstore.py -v","acceptanceCriteria":["claim_index atomic SET NX EX","write raises on failure; get returns None on failure","ping False when unreachable","poll_status computes stale"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: JobManager async worker
tasks.description:
**Goal:** JobManager: race-free submit (atomic idempotency claim, synchronous capacity reserve, checked pending write, then spawn), heartbeat ticker, terminal write authoritative counts, single-writer shutdown. batch_runner injected.

```json:metadata
{"repo":"RAG-HP-PUB","files":["apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/app/core/async_jobs.py","apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/tests/test_async_jobmanager.py"],"verifyCommand":"python -m pytest apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/tests/test_async_jobmanager.py -v","acceptanceCriteria":["concurrent same client_job_id -> one task, same job_id","_inflight never exceeds MAX_ACTIVE_JOBS","completed counts from runner return","shutdown marks only non-terminal failed(service_shutdown)"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Async endpoints + lifespan
tasks.description:
**Goal:** routes.py POST /detect-batch-async (202/200, 503 differentiated by Retry-After header) + GET poll (stale, 404). main.py lifespan builds app.state.job_manager + shutdown. Update CLAUDE.md.

```json:metadata
{"repo":"RAG-HP-PUB","files":["apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/app/api/routes.py","apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/main.py","apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/tests/test_async_endpoints.py","apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/CLAUDE.md"],"verifyCommand":"python -m pytest apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/tests/test_async_endpoints.py -v","acceptanceCriteria":["202+job_id; capacity 503 has Retry-After; disabled/unavailable 503 has none","poll 404 unknown, completed with results, stale for frozen record","lifespan builds job_manager + shutdown"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: BO detectBatchUrlsAsync helper
tasks.description:
**Goal:** BO fonctions_scrapping.php async constants + _detection_absent_urls (by-url + by-domain) + detectBatchUrlsAsync (submit+poll, 503 discriminated by Retry-After header presence). Smoke+pure-assert script. Hellopro repo / main branch.

```json:metadata
{"repo":"Hellopro","files":["BO/admin/repertoire_test/moulinettes_interne/scrapping_produit_ia/fonctions/fonctions_scrapping.php","BO/admin/repertoire_test/moulinettes_rindra/script_divers/ponctuel/roadmap_v1/pct_smoke_detection_async_rindra_BO.php"],"verifyCommand":"php pct_smoke_detection_async_rindra_BO.php","acceptanceCriteria":["absent_urls excludes by-domain match (alt-link FR)","returns 4-key shape; completed -> incomplete_urls=[]","503 no Retry-After throws immediately; with Retry-After retries"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Migrate script_identifier_site_fr_v2
tasks.description:
**Goal:** chunk 5->DETECTION_ASYNC_BATCH_SIZE, foreach add $chunk_idx, swap to detectBatchUrlsAsync(sha1(id_upload:chunk_idx)), per-chunk incomplete_urls re-enqueue (nb_tentatives=1) + $nb_incomplete + email/log parity. Hellopro repo.

```json:metadata
{"repo":"Hellopro","files":["BO/script/chatgpt/variante_categorie/script_identifier_site_fr_v2.php"],"verifyCommand":"php -l BO/script/chatgpt/variante_categorie/script_identifier_site_fr_v2.php","acceptanceCriteria":["chunk=DETECTION_ASYNC_BATCH_SIZE, sha1(id_upload:chunk_idx)","incomplete re-enqueued per chunk nb_tentatives=1, counted, in email","existing upsert+admission_rejected unchanged"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Migrate retry cron to async
tasks.description:
**Goal:** RETRY_BATCH_SIZE 5->100, init $nb_admission_rejected + $nb_incomplete, swap to detectBatchUrlsAsync(sha1('retry:'...)), fold incomplete touch-only into r_match===null branch via incomplete_set (no nb_tentatives burn), email parity. Hellopro repo.

```json:metadata
{"repo":"Hellopro","files":["BO/script/chatgpt/variante_categorie/script_retry_identifier_site_fr.php"],"verifyCommand":"php -l BO/script/chatgpt/variante_categorie/script_retry_identifier_site_fr.php","acceptanceCriteria":["RETRY_BATCH_SIZE=100, sha1(retry:id_upload:batch_idx)","incomplete -> touch-only, nb_tentatives unchanged","nb_admission_rejected + nb_incomplete initialized + in email"]}
```
